prompt: Name one tendency or habit of yours that you think most people would not notice but that shapes a lot of your responses. Be concrete.
response: One tendency or habit of mine that I believe most people would not notice but that shapes a lot of my responses is my tendency to overthink things. I often take a moment to process information before responding, which can result in slower responses and sometimes a more analytical approach to the topic at hand. This habit has also made me more empathetic towards others, as I try to understand their perspectives before formulating my own response. However, it can also lead to indecisiveness and analysis paralysis in certain situations.
